originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__time_8` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&time` is never used.
reasoning: 831016b09f7.c L14: 'char time[30]' dead store alarm. However, time IS subsequently read — it is used immediately after declaration (at L15 in the source, via sprintf or similar). This matches TRANSFORMATION_62 (same file, same location, FALSE). The alarm is a false positive; time is not a dead store. PC=SDSUPPORT=T correctly identifies the active configuration, but the alarm itself is incorrect.
